programme.title: Spacehunter Adventures in the Forbidden Zone
programme.desc: A crash-landed salvager Peter Strauss meets a waif Molly Ringwald and saves women from a cyborg Michael Ironside on Terra 11

programme.title: Surf Ninjas
programme.desc: Brothers Johnny and Adam surfers from California discover that they are in fact heirs to a tiny South Pacific island nation They also discover their hidden talents while fending off a warlord

programme.title: Beethoven
programme.desc: A slobbering St Bernard becomes the center of attention for a loving family but must contend with a dog-napping veterinarian and his henchmen

programme.title: TBH 117
programme.desc: TBH 117

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S05E26
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S05E26

programme.title: Addams Family 114
programme.desc: Addams Family 114

programme.title: Love Boat 113
programme.desc: Love Boat 113

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: Nicky Sebastian the son of an old neighbor comes to Wameru to ask Tracy to sell him back a strip of land that had belonged to his father Tracy tells him the land is needed as a buffer zone between the preserve and the neighboring cattle ranches But Nicky actually intends to use the land as a hunting zone and to start things in motion lets a truckload of cattle loose into the area hoping to create just the situation Tracy most fears

programme.title: Return of the Tiger
programme.desc: Return of the Tiger

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 31 Fractured Fairy Tales The Elves and the Shoemaker Dudley Do-Right Story 3 Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 32

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 33 Fractured Fairy Tales Sleeping Beauty Peabodys Improbably History William Tecumseh Sherman Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 34

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Steve spends time individually with Billie Jo Bobbie Jo and Betty Jo doing their favorite activities As such each girl believes that Steve has chosen her as his girl At least one - who has been doodling the name BJ Elliott - if not more is even expecting Steve to marry her imminently

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Since she is now in junior college Bobbie Jo thinks shes all grown up and as a grown up she can make her own decisions The latest decision that shes made is to go to an all night party with her friends - the evening is to start with a dance in the school gym lasting until midnight followed by the all night party at the country club

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Howling III
programme.desc: A female werewolf runs away from her family and falls in love with a man who works in the movie business while a sociologist searches for proof of the werewolves existence

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A young football star begins to have nightmares about a serial killer called The Springwood Chopper after finding his last victim Each dream reveals more of the killer until he is blamed for the killings Now his girlfriend begins to experience the same dreamswho is the killer

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Siamese twins one timid and kind-hearted and the other reckless and sadistic must make a decision on whether or not to allow an experimental surgery to have them separated even though one of them doesnt want to be split from the other

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A young orphan named Theodores adopted by the odd and well-off Colberts with a dark secret Theyre not the only ones

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A fast food owner has only one goal in life - to utterly destroy and humiliate his competition However he gets a taste of his own medicine

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A fashion designer demands too much from his model which leads to her suicide This gets all those hed wronged to seek revenge

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A gorgeous but deadly dancer who manipulates men easily and kills for kicks succeeds in drawing Nick into her dangerous web

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter Burkhalter finds out Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: verybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Everybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: An eccentric area hermit furtively exchanges miscellaneous items for his subsistence but when he trades for McCoy assets Amos has him arrested for theft but is regretful when a hearing to put the man under state supervision ensues

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When the gossip-monger postman who has witnessed George McMichaels will lets it slip that Lukes family benefits substantially Luke Kate and the children engage in excessively fawning behavior toward George to the disgust of Amos

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: When Bear becomes ill BJ takes him to a vet and is subsequently told that he has died However it turns out that the vet is secretly selling animals to a laboratory and Bear is still alive

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger invests in Lady Linda a lovesick racehorse that wont run so its Mister Ed the love doctor to the rescue

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: George Burns is offering 25000 for a great new novelty act so Wilbur begs Mister Ed to talk to Mr Burns

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Suspecting a security leak at Stalag 13 Gen Burkhalter goes fishing with some false information and Col Hogan falls for the bait As a result Burkhalter plants a spy among the prisoners to expose the guilty parties

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: An assertive Gen Burkhalter requisitions the famous Édouard Manet painting The Fife Player from the Louvre museum in Paris to give to Hermann Goering as a birthday present Undaunted by seemingly impossible logistics Hogan and LeBeau decide to steal it back

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadgets skiing holiday is interrupted when MAD try to rob a Swiss bank of its gold reserves

programme.desc: Quimby instructs Gadget to retrieve a powerful microcomputer from MAD that is capable of teleportation

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Henry Flatt a man the Dukes know whom is believed to be dead shows up alive He faked his death because he took some money from Boss Hogg and to avoid his wrath which included a burial at the local cemetery He learned that because no one has been buried at the cemetery for some time Boss can get the land to use for one of his projects and when he digs up his grave Boss will know he is not dead So he sets out to put another body in his grave so he gets an unclaimed body And the Dukes try to help him before things get out of hand

programme.title: Hercules 201
programme.desc: Hercules 201

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Taelons decide to leave Earth when it appears that the Jiridians are invading Meanwhile a group of Resistance prisoners saved from the mother ship include several disguised Jiridians who are causing trouble for Liam and Renee

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Blackwood Project investigates individuals who claim to have had close encounters The team stumbles onto an alien plot involving implanting something into victims bodies for the study of the human immune system setting them free and collecting them later to learn the results Harrison ends up dating one of the victims Karen McKinney

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Wills father an adventurer by trade arrives in town to search for a rare flower

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane injects a dead man with a life-restoring serum that gives him the touch of death

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The arrival of the Alphans on another planet seems to cause a change in its atmosphere setting off pollution and poisoning of the water They meet Zoran the sole survivor of the last exploratory force who tells them that the planet is controlled by an immortal being - with whom Koenig must parley if he and his crew are to leave the planet alive

programme.title: Highlander
programme.desc: An immortal Scottish swordsman must confront the last of his immortal opponents a murderously brutal barbarian who lusts for the fabled Prize

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: After Cheyenne takes a cattle herd to Mexico he is captured by the French After escaping he aids a young runaway princess who doesnt like her much older intended husband He takes her to a rebel camp where they learn her real identity

programme.title: Young 319
programme.desc: Young 319

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A religious man is killing clergy Lt Stone and Inspector Keller race to find a connection between the clergymen to each other and to the killer When they figure out who the next victim is Mike Stone puts on the collar

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is the new leader of the Impossible Missions Force with no explanation or even reference made about the departure of predecessor Dan Briggs First up for Phelps is a mission involving the drug trade Cresnik and Walters have cornered the heroin market and sell it at a handsome profit to gangs around the world Phelps devises an operation which will drive a wedge between the heroin dealers and their customers

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon work the hospital round They are called to talk to a mentally-challenged man who threatens to blow up a radio station

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath arrives in a dying desert town only to find himself a visitor in a madhouse His hosts are five deranged people who play bizarre and deadly games with their infrequent guests Heaths role in their hellish fantasy the accused--on trial for rape and murder

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: A fortune in diamonds awaits anyone who gets to it first Murder and arson are just some of the ways of keeping some from succeeding A stranger follows Cheyenne and the treasure hunting party but is he all they have to worry about

programme.title: Embryo
programme.desc: A twisted scientist performs an experiment on a human foetus to accelerate growth from a foetus into an adult in just a few days The experiment results in a beautiful 22-year-old woman who falls in love with her creator

programme.title: Solar Crisis
programme.desc: A huge Solar flare is predicted to fry Earth Astronauts must fly to the sun to drop a talking bomb Freddy at the right time so the flare will point somewhere else Giant IXL Corp CEO Teague thinks the flare wont happen and wants the mission to fail so he can buy the planet cheaply while the scare lasts

programme.title: Billionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: Ron Levin a wealthy businessman has disappeared No body is found but there was a list with instructions in his house - a recipe for murder Its author Joe Hunt is the defendant The successful young business man had formed a team of prestigious former fellow students for a risky project which should make them all rich His partners claim they didnt know about the means

programme.title: Out of the Blue
programme.desc: Bad luck turns to tragedy for an ex-biker Dennis Hopper his drug-addict wife Sharon Farrell and their teenage daughter Linda Manz

programme.title: Badge of the Assassin
programme.desc: Three black revolutionaries gun down two New York City police officers The subsequent investigation puts a white assistant DA and a black police detective on the trail of the killers that leads from New York to San Francisco and down to New Orleans

programme.title: 315 the Moment of Truth
programme.desc: The Cobras a vicious street gang rule an embattled high school with their violent brand of terror But theyre headed for a showdown when an ex-gang-member-gone-good challenges their brutal reign

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce hears a rumour planted by Saw Boss that Audric is aboard the Edro Life ship a ship that is capable of carrying entire civilisations to new galaxies Jayce is able to get aboard the ship by steering the Pride through the thrusters energy flow

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League lands on a desert planet with no plant life assuming that is where Audric would be They are mistakenly led by a mirage of Audric to try and rescue him but they are attacked by the native nomads who have been tricked

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM kidnaps a young lizard creature known as a dinosauroid

programme.title: MASK

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby instructs Gadget to retrieve a powerful microcomputer from MAD that is capable of teleportation

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to the Arab Emirate of Yatzanistan to protect Prince Akars sacred sword from falling into the wrong hands

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades gain an ally in Trident a cybernetichuman mix who takes the worlds leaders hostage
